sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 472 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.538/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 10.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate holding brief for Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
